Kitchen by Nagad

Who We Are

A Legacy of
Refined Craftsmanship

For over 40 years, we have partnered with homeowners, interior designers, architects, builders, and developers to deliver thoughtfully curated cabinetry solutions across custom, semi-custom, and stock programs. Founded in Brooklyn, New York, Nagad Cabinets has grown to serve residential and commercial projects throughout the East Coast.

Our approach is rooted in the belief that elevated design and exceptional craftsmanship should not be reserved exclusively for bespoke budgets. Through careful specification, thoughtful planning, and decades of industry experience, we deliver a level of refinement often associated with the industry's most exclusive cabinetry — without compromise.

Our Philosophy

We believe exceptional spaces are defined by the seamless integration of design, functionality, and thoughtful execution.

Every project brings its own priorities and possibilities. Our role is to guide clients and design professionals toward cabinetry solutions that fulfill the architectural vision while respecting scope, timeline, and investment.

From bespoke private residences to large-scale developments, our approach is rooted in collaboration, technical expertise, and enduring reliability.

Kitchen by Nagad

The Process

From Vision
to Reality

01

Understanding the Vision

Every project begins with understanding the client's vision and developing an initial concept that reflects both the desired aesthetic and the practical needs of the space. In our showrooms we guide clients through finishes, hardware, faucets, accessories, and an extensive stone selection for countertops.

02

Materializing the Concept

With a clear understanding of the client's vision, we create a thoughtfully considered layout that balances functionality, storage, flow, and aesthetics. We evaluate a range of cabinetry, material, and manufacturer options to determine the solution best suited to the project's design intent and overall scope.

03

Design Collaboration

Throughout the design phase, we work closely with each client — continually reviewing plans, refining details, and making adjustments as the project develops. We evaluate layout options, storage solutions, and material selections to ensure every decision supports both everyday usability and the overall character of the space.

04

Execution

Once the design is finalized, a member of our team conducts detailed on-site field measurements to ensure every element is executed with precision. We then proceed with procurement of materials and coordinate trusted installation professionals for a seamless transition from planning through final completion.

Kitchen by Nagad

What Sets Us
Apart

I

40 Years of Experience

Decades of industry knowledge allow us to anticipate challenges, streamline planning, and guide projects with confidence — making informed decisions long before installation begins.

II

Project Coordination

Our experience across residential, commercial, and development projects allows us to navigate every detail from concept through completion with reliable coordination and clear communication.

III

Tailored Selection

Unlike firms limited to a single cabinetry line, we choose from a large variety of cabinet dealers — strategically aligning each client's aesthetic vision and budget with the manufacturer best suited, whether stock, semi-custom, or fully custom.

IV

Luxury at Every Tier

Elevated design shouldn't be reserved for premium price points alone. Our approach allows clients to achieve refined, high-end aesthetics while balancing practical efficiencies and investment goals.
